2606.19404.title: Thermodynamic Signatures of Reasoning: Free-Energy and Spectral-Form-Factor Diagnostics for Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
2606.19404.paper_summary: Hallucination detection in large language models (LLMs) is deployment-critical, and recent work shows that the spectrum of attention-derived graph Laplacians carries strong signal about reasoning quality. Prior spectral diagnostics, however, summarize the Laplacian spectrum by a handful of eigenvalues or hand-picked scalars, leaving most of its structure unused. We propose Free-Energy Signatures (Fes), a spectral descriptor that treats each layer's attention Laplacian as a Hamiltonian and extracts its thermodynamic potentials partition function, free energy, spectral entropy, heat capacity together with the random-matrix-theory (RMT) spectral form factor. We prove three results: (i)~Lipschitz stability of Fes under attention perturbation; (ii)~an expressiveness result showing that Fes enriches finite spectral summaries and approximates moment-derived spectral functionals under explicit regularity and grid-resolution assumptions; and (iii)~a finite-sample PAC bound on the AUROC of a training-free detector built from Fes. Empirically, across six open-weight LLMs and six benchmarks, a lightweight probe on Fes descriptors achieves the strongest aggregate AUROC among attention-spectral baselines, improving over LapEig by $+6.5$ AUROC points and over GoR-4 by $+2.4$ points on average, while requiring no update to the underlying LLM. In the fully unsupervised setting, an RMT-deviation score achieves mean AUROC $0.71$, providing a label-free but weaker detector. A complementary RMT analysis shows that correct generations exhibit more Wigner-Dyson like spectral statistics, whereas hallucinations exhibit more Poisson-like statistics. The anonymized code and config are provided in the supplementary material.
2606.19404.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）中的幻覺檢測對於部署至關重要，最近的研究顯示，基於注意力的圖拉普拉斯算子光譜提供了關於推理質量的強信號。然後，先前的光譜診斷僅用少數特徵值或精心挑選的標量來總結拉普拉斯光譜，導致其大部分結構未被利用。我們提出了自由能特徵（Fes），這是一種光譜描述符，將每一層的注意力拉普拉斯算子視為哈密頓量，並提取其熱力學勢能的配分函數、自由能、光譜熵、熱容以及隨機矩陣理論（RMT）光譜形狀因子。我們證明了三個結果：（i）在注意力擾動下Fes的利普希茨穩定性；（ii）一個表達性結果顯示Fes豐富了有限的光譜摘要，並在明確的正則性和網格解析度假設下近似由矩生成的光譜泛函；以及（iii）基於Fes構建的無訓練檢測器的有限樣本PAC界限。實證上，在六個開放權重的LLMs和六個基準測試中，對Fes描述符的輕量級探測器在注意力光譜基準中達到了最強的綜合AUROC，相比LapEig提高了$+6.5$ AUROC點，並且相比GoR-4平均提高了$+2.4$點，同時不需要對底層LLM進行更新。在完全無監督的設置中，RMT偏差分數達到了平均AUROC $0.71$，提供了一個無標籤但較弱的檢測器。一個補充的RMT分析顯示，正確的生成結果展現出更像Wigner-Dyson的光譜統計，而幻覺則展現出更像泊松的統計。匿名的代碼和配置已在補充材料中提供。
2606.19404.author: Salim Khazem et.al.
